text:
Created attachment 190697
Update cacti to 1.1.35

Update cacti to 1.1.35
This is a bugfix release, no merge-quarterly required.
Committer: please ignore portlint warnings regarding gettext as cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.35/
